items.claim: Abdul Hussein has high-level wrestling, pace, and cardio.
items.quote: his wrestling is legit, his pace is legit, his cardio is legit

items.claim: Abdul Hussein takes pro boxing matches in his free time to improve his striking.
items.quote: he's taking pro boxing matches in his free time to really hone that part of his game.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein trains out of Finland with a good team.
items.quote: training out of Finland, he's got a good team around him.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein went 8-0 as an amateur, including winning the 2015 IMAF European Championship and 2016 IMAF World Championship.
items.quote: he went 8-0 as an amateur and that included he was the 2015 IMAF European champ, the 2016 IMAF World Champ.

items.claim: Cody Gibson lacks the cardio to keep up anymore at 38 years old.
items.quote: Cody Gibson just doesn't have the cardio to keep up anymore. He's 38 years old.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's ability to take damage is starting to lessen.
items.quote: His ability to take damage is certainly starting to lessen.

items.claim: Cody Gibson had never been knocked out in over 30 professional fights prior to being knocked down by Richie Lencz.
items.quote: Gibson had never been knocked out. His entire career, 30 plus fights, never been knocked out. Last time out against a Richie Lang, knocked down 21 seconds.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is taking this fight on short notice and traveling down to the Middle East.
items.quote: traveling all the way down to the Middle East to take on someone who's going to be getting a lot of crowd support.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein is faster than Cody Gibson with better scrambles and wrestling.
items.quote: Hussein just seems faster than him. Better scrambles, better wrestling.
